User.title: User
User.description: Represents the user profile record for MyDay

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user matching their Firebase Auth UID

fullName.description: The full name of the user

profileImage.description: URL to the user's profile image

city.description: The user's home or current city

preferredStyle.description: The user's preferred aesthetic celebration style

averageBudget.description: Average budget the user is willing to spend

BirthdayPlan.title: BirthdayPlan
BirthdayPlan.description: Represents a custom or AI-generated birthday celebration plan

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this birthday plan

recipientName.description: The name of the birthday celebrant/recipient

relationship.description: Relationship of the user to the celebrant

birthdayDate.description: The date of the birthday celebration

age.description: The age the celebrant is turning

budget.description: Calculated or designated budget in Naira

city.description: City where the event will take place

celebrationStyle.description: The preferred style or vibe of the celebration

interests.description: List of celebrant interests or hobby tags

aiPlan.description: AI orchestrated details, theme title, description, and itinerary

status.description: Current state of the birthday plan

Vendor.title: Vendor
Vendor.description: Represents a service provider curated on the platform

vendorName.description: The public commercial name of the vendor

category.description: Category of the vendor's service offerings

description.description: A comprehensive biography and overview of their service

images.description: List of photo URLs showcasing their portfolio

verified.description: Indicates whether the vendor is officially verified by MyDay

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Represents a vendor booking reservation made for a specific plan

vendorId.description: The ID of the vendor booked

birthdayPlanId.description: The ID of the birthday plan this booking belongs to

totalAmount.description: Total pricing for the booked service

paymentStatus.description: Status of the payment for this booking

bookingDate.description: The date the booked service will be delivered

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents an alert or message sent to a user

message.description: Full text body of the notification message

read.description: Whether the user has read the message

/birthdayPlans/{planId}.description: Birthday plans generated or authored by users

/vendors/{vendorId}.description: Curated list of premium service providers

/bookings/{bookingId}.description: Vendor bookings linked to birthday plans
